jobDesc: Built a dating-matching platform and an interest-based "activity meetup" community app, bringing people with shared interests together for real-world meetups.
Involved from requirement planning, flow and UI design, and AI implementation through to the iOS App Store launch.
AI implementation: used Claude for match suggestions, chat coaching, icebreaker topics, and auto-generated bios.
Content-moderation and safety module: AWS Rekognition (sync for images, async for video), sensitive-word filtering, and real-person face verification.
Flutter cross-platform app plus a NestJS / TypeScript backend (180+ APIs, 1,066 automated tests, Redis caching and MySQL index optimization), packaged and deployed with Docker.
Defined a North Star Metric, ran competitive assessments, and narrowed the feature set by subtraction (4-tab IA, data-model normalization).
Responsible for backend architecture design and technical decisions across several game and platform products, covering real-time systems, asynchronous flows, and high-concurrency scenarios.
Built backend services in Node.js / TypeScript, did MySQL performance optimization and Redis caching, and deployed and debugged on Linux / Docker.
Assessed risk, performance, and scalability at the architecture level, identified bottlenecks and proposed fixes, including async processing, resource allocation, and system load optimization.
Used logs, metrics, and behavioral data for system observation and issue diagnosis.
Introduced design review, code review, and release checklists, and set implementation standards.
Worked on development and operations for multiple backend systems, including games, lotteries, blockchain fair random numbers, crawler data, and admin dashboards.
Responsible for system analysis, backend implementation, code refactoring, and performance optimization, reshaping inherited legacy code into a more maintainable module structure.
Took part in requirement planning, clarifying business logic and implementation approaches.
Provided API documentation, Postman examples, and technical docs.
Worked on several business system projects, including lending systems, a video streaming platform, an equipment repair system, and e-commerce modules.
Lending system: backend core development and data flow design (Node.js / NestJS / MySQL), keeping the transaction flow and data correct.
Video streaming platform: frontend-backend integration and architecture planning, plus the automated deployment pipeline.
Reduced module coupling by splitting frontend/backend responsibilities and reworking API design, and set up unit and functional testing.
Worked with product and business teams to turn requirements into workable technical solutions.
